sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 2 (Hachette), Dossier 3 'La France vue par...', Leçon 1 (parler d'un pays et de ses habitants; les pronoms relatifs où et dont; exprimer un pourcentage). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
